beforeSnapshot.name: planRoute
beforeSnapshot.purpose: Orchestrate a weather-aware route plan: compute geometry/ETA, fetch per-leg destination weather, resolve arrival-hour and sun times, and attach risk warnings.

afterSnapshot.name: planRoute
afterSnapshot.purpose: Orchestrate a weather-aware route plan: compute geometry/ETA, fetch per-leg destination weather, resolve arrival-hour and sun times, and attach risk warnings plus an explainable per-leg risk score.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Each leg now needs the explainable riskScore alongside the existing boolean warnings, computed from the same resolved forecast numbers.
implementation: Reuses the already-resolved hourData/prev/sun times and passes them, plus an etaContext derived from the plan's depart/arrive times, into computeLegRiskScore; leaves warnings/riskLevel untouched and sets riskScore:null in the no-weather branch.
